HGSS.059.0000:
Eusine: Did you see it?\f
SUICUNE raced by like a blur, right in
front of my eyes!\f
I have been chasing SUICUNE for almost
ten years, but I have never been this\r
close! I’m all choked up!\f
HGSS.059.0001:
By the way...
It was clear to me that SUICUNE took\r
notice of your presence.\f
Ecruteak’s legendary Pokémon are said
to come to people only when they\r
recognize their talents.\f
Perhaps I should be more aggressive
toward SUICUNE...\f
Anyway, [0103,0000,0000], we will
meet again!\f
